_metadata.project: SCPN Fusion Core - UpCloud L4 Native Solver Benchmark Bundle

efit_geqdsk_profile_source.benchmark_contract: Strict raw GEQDSK profile-source fixed-boundary reconstruction gate with separate operator-source solver and named-adapter profile-source diagnostics.

free_boundary.benchmark_contract: External coil Green-function vacuum flux on boundary, limiter, axis, and X-point metadata; not a fixed-boundary Dirichlet replay or reduced-order surrogate.
